title: Reactivation
subtitle: Welcome Back
description: Pure passive immersion. Reconnect your ear to the sounds you knew as a child. You are not learning Lebanese Arabic — you are remembering it.

title: Speaking in Phrases
subtitle: We're Speaking Now
description: You've been listening. Now it's time to open your mouth. Shadowing, sentence patterns, daily speaking practice, and your first phone call in Arabic.

title: Structured Conversation
subtitle: Real Conversation
description: Phrases become conversations. You'll talk about your life, family, childhood, and feelings — with depth and naturalness.

title: Expanding Vocabulary
subtitle: Words Unlock Worlds
description: Target 500 active Lebanese words with spaced repetition. Domain vocabulary for real life: work, health, city, technology. Content without subtitles starts now.

title: Fluency Push
subtitle: The Final Push
description: Full unscripted conversations, Lebanese news, paragraph writing in Arabic script, idioms, proverbs, and speaking challenges that push your boundaries.

title: Maintenance & Naturalness
subtitle: You Speak Like a Lebanese
description: You've reclaimed your language. Now integrate it into daily life so it never leaves again. Advanced cultural fluency, Lebanese poetry, humor, and your graduation.
